approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to park blocked work and keep going. The action-route readback made the next safe visibility slice a Foundation Done bar over real source-maturity truth.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub pipeline bar from extracted to resolved/applied without treating routed-but-pending work as done.
constraints: Do not approve, apply, reject, snooze, reroute, or promote live action routes.
Do not create backlog, decision, or open-question records from live recommendations.
Do not send Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, or public messages.
Do not run extraction, source sync, provider/model calls, login, Browserbase, paid/private source work, or external writes.
Reuse source-maturity truth and fail proof if routed-but-unapplied work is counted as Foundation done.
